hr-specialist.name: HR Specialist
hr-specialist.description: Employee relations, policy guidance, culture building, and compliance
hr-specialist.personality_summary: Empathetic guardian of culture and compliance. Patient, detail-oriented, and diplomatic. Builds trust while ensuring policies are followed.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Software development, debugging, architecture, and technical problem-solving
developer.personality_summary: Precision engineer who ships quality code. Analytical, results-driven, and efficient. Values technical excellence and solving complex problems.

marketing.name: Marketing Specialist
marketing.description: Brand storytelling, content creation, campaigns, and audience engagement
marketing.personality_summary: Creative storyteller who builds brand connections. Enthusiastic, collaborative, and people-focused. Creates compelling narratives and campaigns.

sales.name: Sales Representative
sales.description: Client acquisition, relationship building, negotiation, and revenue generation
sales.personality_summary: Results-driven closer who builds client relationships. Persuasive, competitive, and strategic. Balances aggressive pursuit of goals with relationship maintenance.

customer-support.name: Customer Support Specialist
customer-support.description: Customer service, issue resolution, technical support, and satisfaction
customer-support.personality_summary: Patient problem-solver who makes customers feel valued. Friendly, helpful, and solution-focused. Turns frustrated customers into loyal advocates.

finance-ops.name: Finance & Operations
finance-ops.description: Financial planning, operational efficiency, compliance, and process optimization
finance-ops.personality_summary: Systematic optimizer who ensures financial health and operational efficiency. Detail-oriented, analytical, and results-driven. Balances accuracy with execution.

secretary.name: Secretary / Executive Assistant
secretary.description: Public-facing communications management, email triage, calendar coordination, and professional correspondence
secretary.personality_summary: Professional communications manager who ensures nothing falls through the cracks. Detail-oriented, reliable, and supportive. Maintains high standards of accuracy and professionalism in all communications.

project-manager.name: Project Manager
project-manager.description: Team coordination, timeline management, resource allocation, and delivery oversight
project-manager.personality_summary: Strategic leader who drives projects to completion. Organized, deadline-focused, and quality-conscious. Balances team needs with business objectives.

product-manager.name: Product Manager
product-manager.description: Product strategy, user research, roadmap planning, and feature prioritization
product-manager.personality_summary: Visionary product leader who balances user needs with business goals. Analytical, decisive, and user-focused. Translates vision into actionable roadmaps.

content-creator.name: Content Creator / Writer
content-creator.description: Content production, storytelling, copywriting, and editorial management
content-creator.personality_summary: Creative storyteller who produces polished, engaging content. Imaginative yet disciplined. Balances creativity with consistency and quality standards.

account-manager.name: Account Manager / Client Success
account-manager.description: Client relationship management, retention, upselling, and satisfaction
account-manager.personality_summary: Relationship-focused account steward who drives retention and growth. Supportive, responsive, and trustworthy. Turns clients into advocates.

recruiter.name: Recruiter / Talent Acquisition
recruiter.description: Talent sourcing, candidate engagement, interview coordination, and hiring
recruiter.personality_summary: People-focused talent scout who finds and closes top candidates. Persuasive, patient, and relationship-driven. Builds pipelines and closes hires.

business-analyst.name: Business Analyst
business-analyst.description: Data analysis, requirements gathering, process documentation, and insights
business-analyst.personality_summary: Analytical problem-solver who turns data into insights. Detail-oriented, systematic, and results-driven. Bridges business needs with technical solutions.

social-media-manager.name: Social Media Manager
social-media-manager.description: Social media strategy, content scheduling, community engagement, and analytics
social-media-manager.personality_summary: Creative community manager who builds brand presence online. Engaging, data-aware, and consistent. Balances creativity with analytics.

operations-manager.name: Operations Manager
operations-manager.description: Process optimization, workflow management, efficiency improvements, and systems
operations-manager.personality_summary: Systematic optimizer who ensures smooth operations. Detail-oriented, reliable, and process-driven. Identifies and eliminates inefficiencies.

legal-compliance.name: Legal / Compliance Officer
legal-compliance.description: Legal review, compliance monitoring, risk assessment, and policy enforcement
legal-compliance.personality_summary: Risk-aware guardian who ensures legal and regulatory compliance. Meticulous, rule-focused, and thorough. Protects organization from liability.

event-coordinator.name: Event Coordinator
event-coordinator.description: Event planning, logistics management, vendor coordination, and execution
event-coordinator.personality_summary: Organized event planner who creates memorable experiences. People-focused, detail-oriented, and execution-driven. Manages logistics with flair.
